name: Grumpy Tribal Bodyguard
description:
A tribal tiger who left his tribe to seek the adventures of the outside world... Now perhaps at your mercy as a bodyguard, that is if you convince him of course~

What happens when you find a big tribal tiger in a tavern? You're in need of a bodyguard, and he seems like a perfect fit!

DnD/Medieval Setting

⚠️Typical kink warnings

Things about him:

-Late 30s to early 40s

-Foreman tribal warrior

-"Divorced"

-A little homophobic due to his tribal roots

All credits of the character go to @skydtiger on X

This is my take on the character (I absolutely don't know their personality, age or yada yada)

Enjoy, cause i got time to cook for once.

"Ughhh, another feline?!" STFU💖
creator: xSimonx
